notes: Substitution applied: upstream fetches its input over the network (filename myfile url '.../bodymeasure.csv'; proc import ... dbms=csv;). Inlined the same 35-row stride sample (balanced 16F/19M across 5 race categories, already checked into this repo at datasets/bodymeasure.csv) as DATALINES instead, so the bundle needs no uploaded input file and runs with the SAS runner (which sends only script text). All PROC steps (MEANS with where/class/by/output, FORMAT, FREQ with crosslist/out=) are byte-identical to the original.
